calendar.matters:
Motion And Notice Of Hearing Re Petitioners Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs And Prejudgment Interest On Award
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. GABRIEL LEE-SANCHEZ, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (tel: 415-398-6000) for Petitioner Wells Fargo Clearing Services, LLC.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs And Prejudgment Interest On Award.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "motion for attorneys' fees and costs and prejudgment interest on award" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Order and Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
